title: EKSA Fenrir S Gaming Headset for Xbox one PS5 PS4 Nintendo Switch, 3.5mm Jack Wired Gaming Headphones with Noise Cancelling Mic & LED, 50mm Drivers, PC Over Ear Headphones-Birthday Gift
features: 【Unique New Design】The EKSA Fenrir S gaming headset features an exclusive design inspired by a werewolf, complete with LED lights in the eyes for an intense, immersive look. Prepare to pounce into action and fully engage in your gaming world. This distinctive design also makes for a standout gift.

【Clear Powerful Sound】The EKSA stereo wired gaming headset is crafted for gamers seeking a competitive edge. Its 50 mm drivers deliver exceptional sound clarity and deep, punchy bass, ensuring you catch every crucial detail. From the subtle footsteps of enemies sneaking up behind you to the triumphant roar of victory, this headset provides an immersive audio experience that enhances your gameplay.

【Rotatable Noise-Cancelling Microphone】The over-ear PC gaming headset features a 120-degree rotatable microphone, allowing you to position it for maximum comfort while maintaining crystal-clear communication. The unidirectional microphone effectively reduces environmental noise, ensuring your teammates hear you without any static or background interference, delivering excellent sound quality.

【Comfortable Over-Ear Headphones】The EKSA pc headset for Xbox one is engineered with larger, deeper, and softer ear cushions that are glasses-friendly and perfectly fit your ears. This design allows for hours of comfortable gameplay without feeling weighed down by your headphones.

【Multi-Platform Compatibility】The EKSA Fenrir S gaming headphone is a versatile, cross-platform headset that works with PC, PS4, PS5, Xbox One, Nintendo Switch, and mobile devices via the 3.5 mm audio jack.
